messages.content: If I were you, I ____ to a doctor.
If I were you, I would go to a doctor.
I ____ to Africa on business.
I would travel to Africa on business.

I ____ to Africa on business.
I am going to Africa on business.
I worked hard ____ my exam.
I worked hard for my exam.
When he ____ finished the exam, he'll speak to you.
When he has finished the exam, he'll speak to you.
If he ____ the car immediately, the accident wouldn't have happened.
If he had stopped the car immediately, the accident wouldn't have happened.
You ____ your homework before you came to the lesson.
You should have done your homework before you came to the lesson.
By the next year he ____ his exams.
By the next year, he will have passed his exams.

I've rung the bell but there's no answer. He must be in bed.
I'm thinking ____ away next Sunday.

Would you mind ____ me $5?
Would you mind lending me $5?
He didn't look when crossing the road. He ____ in a hurry.
He didn't look when crossing the road. He must have been in a hurry.
He ____ eaten something before going to school.
He should have eaten something before going to school.

In spite of ____ late she caught the bus.
In spite of being late, she caught the bus.
